Updating customer info requires changes across multiple methods (update_customer_name, update_customer_address, etc.).
Class changes for multiple unrelated reasons (promotion, discount, new arrivals notifications).
Chained if-else statements branching on complaint type.
Method is never called and contains only a pass statement.
Method is never called and contains only a pass statement.
Method body performs multiple unrelated tasks (setting pizza details, updating customer info, notifications, etc.).
Method declares 6 parameters (pizza_type, size, crust_type, toppings, extra_cheese, discount_code).
Repeated call to set_topping with the same value.
Method delegates to middle_method without adding behavior.
Method accesses internal details of another class (size, dough_type, topping).
Method is intended to be overridden but is empty in the base class.
CheesePizza subclass overrides handle_complaint and adds cheese_type field, ignoring parent state.
